description_long: This object is a classic bolt-action rifle featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with metallic bands and a wooden stock. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, extending from the butt to the trigger guard, and is finished in a rich brown wood grain. The barrel is metallic, likely steel, with a smooth, slightly reflective surface and several gold-toned bands securing it to the stock. A simple iron sight is mounted atop the barrel, and the trigger guard and bolt mechanism are visible, both rendered in metallic tones. The rifle's overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century military or hunting rifles, with no visible magazine protruding from the underside. The craftsmanship suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a long steel barrel, gold-toned bands, and a polished wooden stock. Features include a simple iron sight and metallic trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and gold-toned bands.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view showing the circular muzzle and the alignment of the barrel bands, with minimal stock visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and sight, mirroring the details of view 0.
description_view_3: View from the butt of the rifle, showing the rounded end of the stock and the top of the barrel with the sight visible.
